label: Game setup step
description: Defines one ordered step in the world generation setup sequence. Steps run in ascending order value; ties break by def index.

order.label: Order
order.description: Execution order. Steps with lower values run first; ties are broken by def index.

executeAfterWorldSetup.label: Execute after world setup
executeAfterWorldSetup.description: When true, this step defers execution until after the main world setup sequence completes.

setupStep.label: Setup step
setupStep.description: Polymorphic object that performs the setup work. The XML Class attribute selects the concrete GameSetupStep subclass.

new-game-setup-step.label: New game setup step
new-game-setup-step.description: Blank game setup step using the Grids subclass as the default placeholder.
